description: This pipeline processes image and data inputs through a series of operations, including conversion to RGB, measurement extraction, histogram plotting, and export to various file formats, ultimately resulting in the output of processed images and statistical measurements.

b5f6352e-2191-4906-a80f-4e6b40027d25.name: ij3d-measure-pairwise-roi3d
b5f6352e-2191-4906-a80f-4e6b40027d25.description:
Extracts all pairwise statistics between the 3D ROI

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

b122b8c7-afb3-4300-a0df-5de98a1ad6a6.name: ij1-color-to-rgb
b122b8c7-afb3-4300-a0df-5de98a1ad6a6.description: Converts the incoming image to RGB. This applies the LUT if any is set. Compared to the image converter node, this operation renders the image into a representation equivalent to an image viewer, meaning that contrast settings are preserved.

1ab0c8e2-f7ad-4be7-aa01-fa041f7cab5f.name: io-interface
1ab0c8e2-f7ad-4be7-aa01-fa041f7cab5f.description: Passes its input to its output without changes.

34afbb27-ce2b-4b85-a3fb-2a755f2b58f6.name: plot-table:plot-histogram
34afbb27-ce2b-4b85-a3fb-2a755f2b58f6.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Histogram plot.

55d3a541-e16d-4308-a47e-a688fd4146b2.name: iji-export-image-v2
55d3a541-e16d-4308-a47e-a688fd4146b2.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

3b432927-a4a5-49aa-98a5-3b214e0933dd.name: export-data-by-parameter-v2
3b432927-a4a5-49aa-98a5-3b214e0933dd.description: Exports the input data via JIPipe's standard exporter. The output is the directory that contains the generated file(s).
